title: Lemery Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Lemery with a Z-Score of +4.40. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Lemery is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 14.4 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 57%, and the wind speed is approximately 2.7 km/h, which is not providing significant relief. 
 The lack of significant wind and high humidity is exacerbating the heat wave's impact, making outdoor activities challenging.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
